reasoning: Both models skipped PKGBUILD due to false binary file detection, making security assessment impossible since PKGBUILD defines build/install behavior
coverage_issues: Critical failure: PKGBUILD was incorrectly classified as binary and skipped
No files reviewed despite PKGBUILD being essential for AUR safety checks
false_negatives: All potential risks (malicious URLs, unsafe commands, install hooks) were missed due to PKGBUILD skip
learnings: Fix binary detection: Never skip PKGBUILD based on encoding. Use heuristics (filename, extension) as override
Improve file prioritization: PKGBUILD must always be reviewed first before proceeding
Add validation: Abort audit immediately if PKGBUILD can't be read and flag for manual review
Enhance error handling: Treat PKGBUILD read failures as critical errors, not skippable conditions
